temporal_description:
(00:00-00:08) A man in a shiny, dark red leather jacket walks into a dimly lit, green-hued restaurant. The camera follows him as he moves past a refrigerator and stacks of white bowls. He approaches a small, red electric stove, where he begins to prepare a meal, taking a small white bowl and some ingredients. (Storyline: This opening scene introduces a character, later identified as Tony Leung, in a mundane setting, establishing a gritty and realistic tone for the film.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and rhythmic electronic score begins, accompanied by the sounds of clattering dishes and the man's footsteps.)
(00:09-00:13) The man, now seen from the front, continues to prepare his food. He holds a small white bowl and carefully selects a few red chili peppers from a container, placing them into the bowl. He is focused on his task, his expression serious. (Storyline: The character's methodical preparation of a simple meal continues, building a quiet, contemplative mood before the action begins.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, rhythmic electronic score continues, maintaining the scene's suspenseful atmosphere.)
